title: Vaporized Hydrogen Peroxide Sterilization Cycle Validation
author: Paulo R Laranjeira
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qbxdspn

steps.title: Install a sterilization agent leak monitor...
steps.instruction: Install a sterilization agent leak monitor on top of the equipment; Place inside of a small tyvek pouch one BI and one chemical indicator (CI) Place three tyvek pouches with BIs and CIs as follows: one right below sterilization agent entrance one in the middle of the chamber one in the distal point from sterilization agent entrance Select the sterilization cycle that will be evaluated; Monitor continuously the cycle; When the first plasma phase is finished, after the end of the first diffusion, abort the cycle; Open the door right after it is cleared by the equipment control; Record the sterilization agent concentration from the monitor; Remove the three pouches, taking out the BIs an CIs; Incubate the BIs immediately; Repeat the procedure two more times.

steps.title: Install a sterilization agent leak monitor...
steps.instruction: Install a sterilization agent leak monitor on top of the equipment; Place inside of a small tyvek pouch one BI and one chemical indicator (CI) Place three tyvek pouches with BIs and CIs as follows: one right below sterilization agent entrance one in the middle of the chamber one in the distal point from sterilization agent entrance Select the sterilization cycle that will be evaluated; Monitor continuously the cycle; At the end of the second diffusion, right after the gas removal, abort the cycle; Open the door right after it is cleared by the equipment control; Record the sterilization agent concentration from the monitor; Remove the three pouches, taking out the BIs an CIs; Incubate the BIs immediately; Repeat the procedure two more times.
